title: NIFTEM Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Senior Research Fellow Posts
description: National Institute of Food Technology Entrepreneurship and Management (NIFTEM) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for various Senior Research Fellow Jobs. Candidates with M.E/ M.Tech or M.Sc can use this chance and apply for the NIFTEM Recruitment 2026 . Here we have provided more information about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
